disabled.description: Inspection-only state. No detector, simulation, signing, or submission is started.

paper.description: Sender-free durable paper service is available as a fail-closed data/reconciliation boundary; missing upstream authorities block the cycle.

shadow.description: Detector-only shadow candidates are available only for explicitly enabled shadow-ready strategies; planner, exact simulation and reconciliation remain unavailable until later PRs.

live.description: Hard denied. Signer, sender, settlement and canary are not connected to the supported entrypoint.

components.reason: Installed launcher owns disabled, sender-free paper and sender-free shadow modes; live remains unavailable.
Records capital-prechecked shadow-not-executed outcomes only; it is not a simulator or sender.
Detector returns no opportunities and has no canonical execution pipeline.
Detector returns no opportunities and has no canonical execution pipeline.
PR-056 runtime discovery creates provenance-rich SOL/USDC and selected LST snapshots and bounded shadow candidates; no planner, simulator, sender or live path is enabled.
Protocol manifests and execution conformance are not production evidence.
PR-048 pins Pump official IDL provenance and exposes a shadow-only adapter boundary; detector wiring remains disabled by default and live is denied.
Phoenix/OpenBook fixtures and market subscriptions are not verified for runtime use.
Account decoding and instruction metas are not proven against pinned deployed binary data.
Jupiter is connected only to sender-free discovery through a runtime-owned quota manager; execution admission remains separate and disabled.
Sender-free runner and durable paper service are reachable; missing provider/lifecycle authorities still fail closed before execution.
Legacy script path is preserved only as a thin wrapper around flashloan-bot paper-shadow.
Historical monolith retained for migration/reference only.
Legacy transaction construction is not imported by the supported launcher.
Legacy RPC/Jito routing is outside the supported runtime.
Legacy bundle sender is not a live-ready sender and must not be activated by environment flags.
